hero.headline: Global events without barriers
hero.intro: Concerts, theatre, festivals, sport and more in one place, clearly and simply.
hero.partner-note: For partners: We are building a network of partners in ticketing and experiences.
hero.imageAlt: Illustration: global events connected with Czech and Slovak fans.
section-events-subtitle: Get tickets for the best cultural experiences near you.
feature1-desc: Your tickets are always verified and original.
feature2-desc: We communicate in Czech and handle everything for you.
feature3-desc: Only the best events and partners.
partners-cta: I want to become a partner

contact-legal-note: By submitting the form, you acknowledge our Privacy Policy and Cookies Policy.
about-text: AJSEE® was born from the need to travel for culture without stress or unnecessary barriers. We’re building a platform that opens the door to concerts, festivals, theatre and sports — at home and abroad.
about-hero-text: Experiences have no borders. And that’s exactly why AJSEE was born.
about-hero-subtext: Our goal is to make cultural, entertainment and sports events from around the world accessible – clearly, intuitively, and without unnecessary barriers when choosing and buying tickets.
about-hero-claim: AJSEE<sup>®</sup> is a modern platform for everyone who wants to experience the world – without limits.
about-value-1: Openness – We make world experiences accessible to all.
about-value-3: Innovation – We follow trends, curate the best events and technologies.
about-story-p1: It was autumn 2024. We were sitting in a pub, had a beer — and as it often happens, an ordinary chat sparked something that soon turned into a real idea.
about-story-p2: That very evening, the name AJSEE was born, along with the first logo draft and a vision: to make world experiences accessible without language barriers.
about-story-p3: But then came the hardest phase: to actually start.
about-story-p4: We both had full-time jobs, lived 180 kilometres apart, and time was scarce. The project paused for a while before it really took off.
about-story-p5: Then one day, one of us simply launched it. Without a perfect plan, but with the certainty that it made sense.
about-story-p6: And that’s when AJSEE started becoming reality.
about-future-p1: By the end of 2025, we want to launch the production version of the website.
about-future-p2: We’re expanding language versions and building partnerships with international platforms.
about-future-p3: We’re preparing a mobile app and expanding the selection of events — and their availability for a wider audience.
about-future-p4: We want AJSEE to be the first choice for anyone looking for a path to world-class experiences — whether in London, Barcelona, or at home in Brno.
event-demo-badge: New: accommodation with TrustedStays – planning a trip to the UK for a live experience? For selected events, we can now help with accommodation too.
events-hero-desc: Discover concerts, festivals, theatre and sports in one clear catalogue.
events-load-error: Events could not be loaded. Please try again later.
thankyou-title: Thank you for your message | AJSEE
thankyou-message:
Your message has been sent.
We will get back to you soon.
about-timeline-2024: The first ideas for creating the AJSEE® platform. The vision to connect the cultural world without language barriers is born.
about-timeline-2025: Start of programming and development of the multilingual AJSEE® website.
about-timeline-2025-07-01: Launch of the AJSEE® website test run. The website is opened to the public for the first time and we collect the first feedback from visitors.
about-team-adam-claim: Adam Brázda is the person behind AJSEE®. From the first ideas to the website launch, he leads the project with the vision to connect the world of culture without barriers.
about-team-jan-claim: From day one, Jan has shared the vision of making culture and experiences more accessible to everyone — without unnecessary barriers.
about-cta-headline: Want to be part of it?
about-cta-text: AJSEE® is open to collaboration, ideas and new partnerships. If our mission has caught your interest, write to us – we look forward to hearing from you!
footer-company-info: AJSEE® is operated by AJSEE LTD, registered in England and Wales under company number 17105762. Registered office: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ.
blog-lead: Read reviews of cultural events and discover tips for the best experiences around the world.
faq-a1: AJSEE is a modern platform for tickets to culture, sports, and concerts, designed for users and partners.
faq-q2: How many languages does AJSEE support?
faq-a2: AJSEE is fully localized in 6 languages: Czech, English, German, Slovak, Polish, and Hungarian.
faq-a3: Registration and event browsing are free, you only pay for tickets.
faq-q4: How can I become an AJSEE partner?
faq-a4: Just fill out the form on the Partners page and we will contact you.

cookie-banner.title: We use cookies
cookie-banner.desc: We use necessary cookies for the website to function and, with your consent, also analytics cookies that help us measure traffic and improve AJSEE.cz.
cookie-banner.necessaryText: These cookies are required for the basic functioning of the website.
cookie-banner.analyticsText: They help us measure traffic and improve the website using Google Analytics.
